title: Earth Rated Dog Wipes, Hypoallergenic, Cleaning and Hydrating, for Grooming Paws, Body and Bums, Lavender Scented, 100 Count
features: HIGH-QUALITY DOG WIPES: These textured wipes are the perfect everyday cleaning solution for your dog's paws, body, and bum. With their delightful lavender scent, they keep your dog smelling fresh and clean.

GENTLE INGREDIENTS: These dog wipes contain high-quality ingredients like soothing aloe, shea butter, chamomile, and cucumber. They are perfect for cleaning your dog after walks, hikes, or in between baths.
USER FRIENDLY: Made of thick, durable, USDA Certified 98% Biobased material, our hypoallergenic dog wipes have just the right amount of moisture for an effective clean every time.
A BETTER WIPE: Our dog wipes are hypoallergenic, cruelty-free, dermatologist-tested, and free of alcohol and parabens. Each wipe measures 8" L x 8" W. These dog wipes are not flushable.
OUR MISSION: Earth Rated is on a mission to make life with dogs simpler and better. Proudly B Corp Certified
